items.front: How is the runway in use selected?
items.back: The supervisor or CIC designates it. Use the runway most nearly aligned with the wind at 5 knots or more, or the calm-wind runway below 5 knots, unless another runway or a runway use program is operationally required.

items.front: When may a STOL runway be assigned?
items.back: Only when requested by the pilot or specified in a letter of agreement. If the pilot asks, issue the measured STOL runway length.

items.front: What wind information must always be stated when a tailwind component exists?
items.back: State both wind direction and velocity.
